description:
A deploy-time gate on a permission-set reference within a profile.

The gate lives on `PermissionsConfig` rather than on the reference itself
because `PermissionProfile` is `#[serde(transparent)]` and
`PermissionSetReference` is untagged, so neither can carry a sibling field.

enabledValue.description: Input value for which the permission set stays included

inputId.description: Stack input whose resolved value controls the gate

permissionSetId.description: ID of the permission set being gated (e.g., "queue/data-write")

profile.description: Profile name containing the gated reference

resource.description: Resource key within the profile ("*" or a resource name)
